description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a lush green lawn and several palm trees. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and easy access to the outdoor areas. The backyard includes a patio with lounge chairs, a round table, and a shaded area, ideal for relaxation or outdoor dining. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living spaces, as well as private rooms and bathrooms. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some sections featuring light wood or stone accents. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and there is a small paved area near the entrance, possibly for parking or utility purposes.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious garden featuring palm trees and outdoor lounge areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white exterior wall, partial interior layout, and a grassy yard with palm trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large glass windows, patio with lounge chairs, and a well-maintained lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional palm trees, a shaded seating area, and more of the bungalow's private rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the open-plan interior, dining area, and a small paved section adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
